description_long: This cabin features a broad, dark brown hip roof with a central ridge vent, extending well beyond the walls to create deep eaves. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks with a warm reddish-brown hue, complemented by two prominent vertical stone or timber columns at the corners. The longer facades are lined with a series of evenly spaced, rectangular windows, each with a metallic or wooden frame, and are interspersed with wall-mounted lantern-style lights. The shorter facades each have a central entrance door, flanked by windows and sheltered by the overhanging roof. The structure sits on a slightly raised wooden platform, giving it a sturdy, grounded appearance. The overall design blends rustic materials with a symmetrical, orderly arrangement, suitable for a residential neighborhood or park setting.
description: A rustic cabin with a wide, dark hip roof, horizontal wood siding, and symmetrical rows of windows and doors, accented by stone or timber columns and lantern lights.
description_view_0: The short facade features a central entrance door flanked by two windows, with two large vertical columns and wall lanterns on either side.
description_view_1: The long side displays a row of five evenly spaced windows, each with a lantern between them, and two corner columns anchoring the facade.
description_view_2: The opposite short facade mirrors the first, with a central door, two windows, and two prominent columns, but with slightly different lighting arrangement.
description_view_3: The second long side matches the first, with five windows and lanterns, maintaining the symmetrical and orderly appearance.
attribute_roof_type: hip roof with deep overhangs and a central ridge vent, constructed from dark wooden shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Ten rectangular windows, five on each long side, evenly spaced in a symmetrical row; two additional windows on each short side flanking the central door, all of similar size and shape
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on each short facade, flanked by windows and positioned between two vertical columns
